summary: Frontend-only testing for XAC CRM SIMPLIFICATION. Verified removal of WorkflowBuilder, MarketingPanel, MarketingDashboard, MarketingForms, Baileys WhatsApp session UI, and dashboard recharts graphs. Verified wa.me link approach for WhatsApp from Leads and Appointments pages. All 10 feature checks from review request PASSED.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js: Clean - no MarketingPanel/MarketingDashboard/MarketingForms/WorkflowBuilder imports or routes.

Layout.js: Sidebar nav correctly omits Workflows/Marketing/Ad Manager; nav items match spec (Dashboard, Leads, Appointments, Reports, Analytics, Commission, Gallery, Emergent Fixes, Bug Reports, Settings).
Leads.js handleSendWhatsApp (line 249) uses window.open(https://wa.me/{phone}?text=...) as expected; modal shows 'Open WhatsApp' button.
Appointments.js sendWhatsAppAction (line 119) uses wa.me link; Send Pin / Send Reminder / Follow Up buttons visible.
Settings.js: Integrations tab shows 'WhatsApp Integration' card (wa.me links how-it-works) and 'Meta Lead Forms' card; no Baileys session setup or QR code flow present.
Settings User Management: No 'WhatsApp Session' / 'WA Session' badges present on users.
Dashboard has 0 recharts elements (graphs removed); stat cards + Today's Appointments panel + Active Month/Edit Period/Generate Report controls present.

Dead source files still exist on disk: /app/frontend/src/pages/WorkflowBuilder.js, MarketingDashboard.js, MarketingForms.js, MarketingPanel.js. They are not imported from App.js so dead weight only - safe to delete for cleanliness.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Simplification verified in iteration 9: (1) Admin login works directly at /login, (2) Dashboard has stat cards (Total Leads, Conversion Rate, Cash Sales, Debit Sales), Active Month period controls (Edit Period / Generate Report), and Today's Appointments - no recharts graphs, (3) Sidebar contains exactly: Dashboard, Leads, Appointments, Reports, Analytics, Commission, Gallery, Emergent Fixes, Bug Reports, Settings (no Workflows/Marketing/Ad Manager), (4) Leads WhatsApp modal shows 'Open WhatsApp' button (not 'Send Message') and uses wa.me link on click, (5) Appointments page renders Send Pin / Send Reminder / Follow Up action buttons, (6) Settings -> Integrations tab has WhatsApp wa.me info card + Meta Lead Forms card, no Baileys session/QR UI, (7) Settings -> Message Templates tab functional, (8) Settings -> User Management has no WhatsApp session badges, (9) Commission page loads for admin with no errors, (10) Bug Reports page loads for admin. Dead files WorkflowBuilder.js, Marketing*.js still exist in /app/frontend/src/pages/ but are not imported - consider deleting.
